| `services.pgbackrest.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable pgBackRest. |
| `services.pgbackrest.repos` | `attribute set of (open submodule of attribute set of (boolean or (unsigned integer, meaning >=0) or string or attribute set of string or list of string))` | An attribute set of repositories as described in: <https://pgbackrest.org/configuration.html#section-repository> Each repository defaults to set `repo-host` to the attribute's name. The special value "localhost" will unset `repo-host`. ::: {.note} The prefix `repoNNN-` is added automatically. Example: Use `path` instead of `repo1-path`. ::: |
| `services.pgbackrest.repos.<name>.host` | `null or string` | Repository host when operating remotely |
| `services.pgbackrest.repos.<name>.sftp-host` | `null or string` | SFTP repository host |
| `services.pgbackrest.repos.<name>.sftp-private-key-file` | `null or absolute path not in the Nix store` | SFTP private key file. The file must be accessible by both the pgbackrest and the postgres users. |
| `services.pgbackrest.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (boolean or (unsigned integer, meaning >=0) or string or attribute set of string or list of string)` | An attribute set of options as described in: <https://pgbackrest.org/configuration.html> All globally available options, i.e. all except stanza options, can be used. Repository options should be set via [`repos`](#opt-services.pgbackrest.repos) instead. |
| `services.pgbackrest.stanzas` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | An attribute set of stanzas as described in: <https://pgbackrest.org/user-guide.html#quickstart/configure-stanza> |
| `services.pgbackrest.stanzas.<name>.instances` | `attribute set of (open submodule of attribute set of (boolean or (unsigned integer, meaning >=0) or string or attribute set of string or list of string))` | An attribute set of database instances as described in: <https://pgbackrest.org/configuration.html#section-stanza> Each instance defaults to set `pg-host` to the attribute's name. The special value "localhost" will unset `pg-host`. ::: {.note} The prefix `pgNNN-` is added automatically. Example: Use `user` instead of `pg1-user`. ::: |
| `services.pgbackrest.stanzas.<name>.instances.<name>.host` | `null or string` | PostgreSQL host for operating remotely. |
| `services.pgbackrest.stanzas.<name>.jobs` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Backups jobs to schedule for this stanza as described in: <https://pgbackrest.org/user-guide.html#quickstart/schedule-backup> |
| `services.pgbackrest.stanzas.<name>.jobs.<name>.schedule` | `string` | When or how often the backup should run. Must be in the format described in {manpage}`systemd.time(7)`. |
| `services.pgbackrest.stanzas.<name>.jobs.<name>.type` | `string` | Backup type as described in: <https://pgbackrest.org/command.html#command-backup/category-command/option-type> |
| `services.pgbackrest.stanzas.<name>.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (boolean or (unsigned integer, meaning >=0) or string or attribute set of string or list of string)` | An attribute set of options as described in: <https://pgbackrest.org/configuration.html> All options can be used. Repository options should be set via [`repos`](#opt-services.pgbackrest.repos) instead. Stanza options should be set via [`instances`](#opt-services.pgbackrest.stanzas._name_.instances) instead. |
